blocks.content: That night Kit stared at Daisy's name on the buddy list for two minutes before he did anything.
She was online. Her away message was a quote he didn't recognize: some things are better left unsaid. He looked at it for a second and then looked away.
eli's theory about the pizza was wrong by the way
he has a lot of confidence for someone with a zero percent success rate
that's kind of his whole thing
It was getting easier. Kit typed without thinking about it, the way he usually did with her.
Three minutes passed. Her icon still showed active.
she said she wants to see the water tower sometime
The response came faster this time.
She went offline. Her name grayed out on the buddy list. Kit sat there looking at it.
